meaning: n.安提俄克(古叙利亚首都,现土尔其南部城市)
examples: 27during this time some prophets came down from Jerusalem to Antioch.

I actually think that's supposed to be "returned from Jerusalem to Antioch."
In 1098, after a five-month siege in the First Crusade, the Crusaders took Antioch.
She is a member of the board of trustees of Antioch University Santa Barbara.
